title: HFT Orders
description: What was actually placed: per-order detail joined with sim fills, order rate, notional, and arb leg-pairing integrity. Note: order timestamps are decision wall-clock — backtest orders sit at replay time.

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT runId FROM hft.orders ORDER BY runId

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS orders FROM hft.orders WHERE runId IN (${run:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(ts)
SELECT round(sum(toFloat64(qty) * toFloat64(price)), 0) AS notional FROM hft.orders WHERE runId IN (${run:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(ts)
SELECT round(avg(toFloat64(qty) * toFloat64(price)), 2) AS avgNotional FROM hft.orders WHERE runId IN (${run:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(ts)

panels.title: Unpaired arb legs (must be 0)
panels.description: Arb risk check commits both legs atomically — any arbId without exactly two orders is a bug.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS unpaired FROM (SELECT runId, arbId FROM hft.orders WHERE isNotNull(arbId) AND runId IN (${run:singlequote}) GROUP BY runId, arbId HAVING count() != 2)

SELECT venue, product, side, count() AS orders, round(sum(toFloat64(qty) * toFloat64(price)), 0) AS "notional $" FROM hft.orders WHERE runId IN (${run:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY venue, product, side ORDER BY venue, product, side
SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS t, runId, toUInt32(count()) AS orders FROM hft.orders WHERE runId IN (${run:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY t, runId ORDER BY t

panels.title: Order detail (latest 500 in range)
panels.description: Orders joined with their sim fill and slippage. fillPx/fee/slip empty = order file predates the fill simulator or fill not matched.

targets.rawSql: SELECT o.ts AS time, o.runId AS run, o.venue AS venue, o.product AS product, o.side AS side, toFloat64(o.qty) AS qty, toFloat64(o.price) AS price, round(toFloat64(o.qty) * toFloat64(o.price), 2) AS "notional $", f.px AS fillPx, round(f.feeUsd, 4) AS "fee $", round(s.slipBps, 3) AS "slip bps", f.partial AS partial, o.arbId AS arbId, round(o.imbalance, 4) AS imbalance, round(o.devBps, 3) AS devBps FROM hft.orders AS o LEFT JOIN hft.v_fills AS f ON f.runId = o.runId AND f.venue = o.venue AND f.orderId = o.id LEFT JOIN hft.v_slippage AS s ON s.runId = o.runId AND s.venue = o.venue AND s.orderId = o.id WHERE o.runId IN (${run:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(o.ts) ORDER BY o.ts DESC LIMIT 500
